name: MSTELCOM, SARL
notes:
MSTelcom is a subsidiary of Sonangol E.P. (Angola's State Oil Company). The strategic objectives of MSTelcom were defined based on market growth, the development of MSTelcom and in need of its own customers. The strategic objectives in the mediumand long term are centered in the following areas:

Providing Quality of Services.
Expand the National  Transmission Network.
Optimizing management and transmission access.
Fixed Telecommunications Network Operator in Angola,licensed by INACOM. MSTelcom portfolio of supported by the latest technologies available in the international market.
